completed_tasks.name: Run 40+ clarifying questions via AskUserQuestion tool (10 batches)
Save feedback memory: always use AskUserQuestion tool for clarifying questions

remaining_tasks.name: /gsd-plan-phase Phase 0 (PHILOSOPHY.md rename, perf harness, Dagger CI, Oxigraph spike)

decisions.decision: Milestone name: v2.0-shards-as-axioms
decisions.rationale: Mirrors PHILOSOPHY.md title; names philosophical through-line

decisions.decision: Scope: Everything including v2.1
decisions.rationale: User wants full refactor in one milestone; open-ended ship window

decisions.decision: Phase decomposition: fine-grained per PRD subsection (~25+ phases)
decisions.rationale: User preference for granular checkpoints

decisions.decision: Commit granularity: per atomic change; section boundaries = PR scope
decisions.rationale: User interpretation of PRD §0 'commit per section'

decisions.decision: Branch: master, no V1_COMPAT flag (greenfield, no v1 corpora exist)
decisions.rationale: Reconciled user's 'Master + flag' + 'No flag' choices: nothing to preserve

decisions.decision: Triplestore: Oxigraph (pyoxigraph) + rdflib bridge
decisions.rationale: Scale 1M-10M shards; Rust speed + rdflib ecosystem for pyshacl/JSON-LD

decisions.decision: Reasoner: owlready2 (pure-Python HermiT)
decisions.rationale: Python-native ergonomics; OWL 2 EL sufficient

decisions.decision: Job queue: Arq + REDIS_URL (12-factor)
decisions.rationale: Async-native; matches exp-backoff+DLQ retry policy

decisions.decision: LLM: agnostic via instructor in §9 refactor
decisions.rationale: Decision #5 compliance in v2.0; Claude default

decisions.decision: DID methods: key + web + plc (all three)
decisions.rationale: Federated community priority

decisions.decision: UI: SvelteKit 5 + adapter-node (SSR)
decisions.rationale: Preserve v1 work; unlock deep-link shard URLs + SPARQL streaming

decisions.decision: UI design: /gsd-ui-phase upfront with fresh bold aesthetic
decisions.rationale: Shards-as-axioms thesis warrants distinctive visual language

decisions.decision: Auth: OAuth (GitHub/Google) + DID binding
decisions.rationale: Balance familiar UX with federated-identity support

decisions.decision: Governance own phase; PROV-O log; §21.10 downstream-weighs (no quorum)
decisions.rationale: Minimal trust infra; keeps decision #10 posture

decisions.decision: SHACL: hybrid Pydantic-generated + hand-written advanced; per-corpus enforcement
decisions.rationale: Single source of truth for 80% + escape hatch for sh:sparql

decisions.decision: Test-first (red-green-refactor); WCAG 2.1 AA blocking gate
decisions.rationale: Quality bar; PRD acceptance tests as failing-first anchors

decisions.decision: Cluster validator (§8 P3): auto-flag + manual override + cheap LLM arbiter (all three)
decisions.rationale: Maximum coverage with human-in-the-loop

decisions.decision: Benchmark corpora: advocacy + FRE + Restatement of Contracts
decisions.rationale: Real-world coverage; tests polysemy + supersession

decisions.decision: Packaging: single Docker image; CI: GitHub Actions + Dagger
decisions.rationale: Host-agnostic deployment; reproducible CI

decisions.decision: Docs: mkdocs-material + notebooks (JupyterLite demos + self-hosted depth)
decisions.rationale: Four consumer audiences need varied onboarding surfaces

decisions.decision: Warrants: one-line `Warrant:` in every commit message (no hooks)
decisions.rationale: Lightweight; preserves PRD §5/§21 traceability; honor-system

decisions.decision: Versioning: CalVer (YYYY.MM); License: MIT (keep)
decisions.rationale: User choice; matches sibling repos

decisions.decision: Community artifacts: CONTRIBUTING + CoC + RFC process + GOVERNANCE
decisions.rationale: Federated community requires onboarding + decision-log infrastructure

decisions.decision: Export formats: combined.ttl + abox/tbox + JSON-LD frames + SPARQL CONSTRUCT + N-Quads + Neo4j
decisions.rationale: Four consumer audiences × different tooling preferences

decisions.decision: PII: redaction on ingest + opt-in private corpora (encrypted at rest)
decisions.rationale: Legal sources may include sensitive facts; default-safe posture

decisions.decision: Threat model: adversarial reviewer (bad-faith promotions) + passive attackers
decisions.rationale: Federated community admits bad actors; plan for them

decisions.decision: Security audits: pre-release (crypto+OAuth) + post-release fuller audit
decisions.rationale: Ship-gate + periodic review

next_action: Run /gsd-new-milestone with .planning/v2.0-MILESTONE-BRIEF.md as input spec. After it generates .planning/milestones/v2.0-shards-as-axioms/ and ROADMAP, kick off /gsd-plan-phase for Phase 0 (PHILOSOPHY.md rename + perf benchmark harness + Dagger CI skeleton + Oxigraph+rdflib-bridge spike).
context_notes: Session was pre-milestone planning for a massive v1→v2 refactor guided by PRD-v2.0-draft-2.md (2006 lines) and PHILOSOPHY.md (522 lines). User invoked /gsd-do asking to plan a new milestone with deep pre-work iteration. Delivered 10 batches of structured AskUserQuestion calls (~40 questions total) to elicit every load-bearing decision before writing a single line of planning. All answers captured in .planning/v2.0-MILESTONE-BRIEF.md. User explicitly requested all Q&A via AskUserQuestion UI from now on — saved as feedback memory at ~/.claude/projects/-home-damienriehl-Coding-Projects-folio-insights/memory/feedback_ask-user-question-ui.md. Context was exhausted (92%) before /gsd-new-milestone could be invoked; resume in fresh session.
